original_abstract: Drawing from an MA dissertation in Heritage and Cultural Tourism, this article explores the emergence of literary tourism as a specialized genre and evaluates its growth potential within the South African context. The original research was conducted within the Department of Historical and Heritage Studies and is accessible via the University of Pretoria’s institutional repository at: http://hdl.handle.net/2263/29043.
humanized_abstract: This article is based on a dissertation for the Master’s degree in Heritage and Cultural Tourism. It explores literary tourism as a genre of heritage tourism and considers the potential for the growth of literary tourism in South Africa. The research was conducted in the Department of Historical and Heritage Studies at the University of Pretoria and the full dissertation is available on the UP’s institutional repository: http://hdl.handle.net/2263/29043.
